Cetio

New Standard in Modern Bathroom

Cetio Tankless Toilets combine intelligent engineering, minimalist design, and elevated comfort, creating a bathroom experience that feels effortless, hygienic, and refined.

Designed for the Future

Designed for the Future of Living

A bathroom is no longer a utility space—it is a reflection of precision, cleanliness, and personal standards.

Cetio reimagines the toilet as an intelligent system: water-efficient, visually seamless, and engineered for absolute comfort.

Every detail is intentional. Every function is refined. Nothing unnecessary remains.

Why Cetio

01

Precision

Fully glazed trap ways and calibrated siphonic pulls, tested flush by flush before release.

02

Silence

Pressure-assist and Kirin flushing systems engineered to run quiet, not just run.

03

Permanence

Ceramic bodies and soft-close hardware built to outlast a renovation cycle, not just survive one.

04

Trust

CUPC® certified, ADA height compliant, and backed by real specification sheets — not marketing copy.
